name: Ive Group Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.6200, stop A$2.3958, target A$2.9190 (1.33:1) — then trail it.
